directive: Do not modify generated TypeScript protocol files under `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/`; change the Rust protocol definitions under `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/` and regenerate the TypeScript instead.
rationale: The checked-in TypeScript schema files are generated artifacts. Manual edits drift from the Rust protocol source and bypass the repo's generation path.

source_evidence.quote: GENERATED CODE! DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND; generated by ts-rs; Do not edit this file manually.
Always set #[ts(export_to = "v2/")] on v2 request/response/notification types so generated TypeScript lands in the correct namespace.
ThreadSourceKind is defined in Rust with #[ts(rename_all = "camelCase", export_to = "v2/")].
